items.question: Deploy BedRock Astro site to Vercel?
items.context: Vercel CLI needs auth. Options: (a) share vercel login email + OTP, (b) paste a token from https://vercel.com/account/tokens, (c) run yourself: `cd ~/BedRock && npx vercel --prod`.
options: a — share email, I'll handle OTP

items.question: Prototype the self-evolving persona system (v0, ~10h)?
items.context: Full spec: /page.html?path=experiments/self-evolving-persona — episodic event log → nightly distillation cron → persona core → /persona viewer. Local-only v0, chat+commits+journal sources only.

items.question: Draft a Crumbs landing-page polish PR (~90 min)?
items.context: Full audit: /page.html?path=projects/crumbs-ux-audit-2026-04-22 — top 3 high-leverage fixes: gradient overlay, value-prop H1, CTA copy rewrite.

items.question: Review the 'Context, not Control' essay — published to Feishu + drafted on site
items.context: Your lark draft was posted into the canonical wiki doc (KT4TwShFHieUNik8Y5Ocgmc9no8) as 24 structured blocks, AND a draft PR is open on BedRock PR #2 adding /writing/ section with the same post. Open questions: (a) CJK line-height polish on site, (b) H1 line-break, (c) publish-or-keep-draft decision.
